events.description: Crystal/Construction deep-dive. Found 3 critical bugs the surface scan missed: F-1 Veilstinger combat AI broken (missing else if causes oscillation), F-2 CrystalExtinctionSystem multiplayer determinism break (genuine MB-21), F-3 failed respawn costs 3 minutes. Plus F-5 (HIGH): construction tick erases combat damage, half-built buildings unkillable. Surface-scan verification: 4/9 confirmed, but only MB-21 is the cosmetic-class bug (others mis-described). Cumulative across 7 deep-dives: ~80 verified findings, ~25 critical/high.
